CustomField.description: If there are program restrictions that expire or end, enter the end date. For example, the date the ground lease or deed restrictions expire. Some programs use this field to populate closing documents.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If there are program restrictions that expire or end, enter the end date. For example, the date the ground lease or deed restrictions expire. Some programs use this field to populate closing documents.
CustomField.label: Restriction End Date
